title: biscutella auriculata var. candollei
intro: Biscutella auriculata var. candollei, also known as Candolle's kidney vetch, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biscutella auriculata var. candollei include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
